productDisplayName: Fiorelli Women Chocolate Brown and Olive Green Wallet
description: Style NoteA practical and stylish solution to managing your monetary essentials, this wallet from fiorelli is the perfect accessory for all your outfits. Handcrafted from premium leather, this piece is specially designed and created with the highest quality standards, ensuring that it will last for several years. Its classic styling and minimalistic detailing offers unbeatable understated style.nbsp; Product DetailsChocolate brown three fold wallet with olive green panel and press button closureMetal brand badge on the frontFlap with four credit card slots and a slip pocketnbsp; Two photo id card slots, three open and one zippered compartmentOne zippered compartment set into the liningFlap with buttoned tab at the back with seven card slots on one side and five card slots with a photo id card on the otherLoop acting as a pen holder at the spineGuarantee: 1yrMaterials and CareLeatherWipe with damp cloth to remove dust SizeDimensions: 19 cm x 10 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
